commit.author: Hermes Agent
commit.subject: Integrate Google Stitch for AI-driven UI/UX design and mockup orchestration

analysis_result.analysis: The commit claims a major integration of AI-driven design tools, but the small code change (27 lines) and the total lack of updates to plan.md or changelog.md suggest this is only a preliminary setup rather than a functional feature. Documentation neglect reduces the overall system value and project clarity.
analysis_result.suggested_message: Initialize Google Stitch integration and add foundational dependencies for UI/UX orchestration
